method: Ballistic ascent to apogee (recovery stripped, wind zeroed). RocketPy is fed Loft's own Cd(Mach) curve — it does not derive drag from geometry — so this cross-checks the trajectory integrator, the mass model, and RocketPy's independent Barrowman centre of pressure, holding drag equal. It is not an independent drag oracle.
generatedBy: scripts/rocketpy (offline; RocketPy is not bundled and does not run in the browser)
